official_pick_rules.note: Lab Rating is setup quality. It is not win probability. Official picks require both strong win probability and strong setup quality.

summary: No official picks cleared the stricter rules. 3 value-watch setups and 3 watchlist games remain research-only. 3 games reached a Lab Rating of 75+ but did not clear every official gate.

games.game: Los Angeles Dodgers @ New York Yankees

lab_score_breakdown.note: Lab Rating grades setup quality. It is not win probability.

games.read: New York Yankees is a value watch, not an official pick. LyDia projects 58.6% against a 49.7% no-vig market number, a 9.0% model edge at -103. Lab Rating 7.8/10: model edge 35, pitcher 15, bullpen 8, market 15, base 5. The setup is strong, but official picks require at least 72.0% model probability and 80/100 Lab Score.

model_v3.note: shadow A/B — does not drive picks

pick_team.label: Fresh
pick_team.workload_read: Low recent workload. No major bullpen fatigue flag from the last three days.
pick_team.score_reason: Fresh (0.0/10). No completed games in the last three days — the pen comes in rested.
pick_team.formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6) + clamp((Last 3 BP runs - 4) x 1.5, -6, 12)

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.
